violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the (back kitchen ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025
(Knives) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair. Knives observed warped. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (knives ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025
Establishment is lacking a mop sink.PIC informed New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
The floor and wall junctures in the (kitchen) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The walls in the (near 3 bay sink) are constructed of (dry wall ). This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023
All handwashing sinks are lacking the proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2023

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as fruits and vegetables) in the rach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2023
Basins for 3 bay sinks are lacking drain plugs. Drain plugs are required to properly sanitize dishes. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2023
Grease trap was not in good repair. Equipment must be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2023

Refuse area was observed with an accumulation of bottles. Refuse area must be maintained clean and free of litter in order to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2023
The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2023
